title: Winey Ukrainian Butter Toast
description: A crispy, winey twist on traditional Ukrainian butter toasts, perfect for brunch.
instructions: Spread 1 tablespoon of softened butter on each slice of bread.
Place bread slices on a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the bread is baking, melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of red wine reduction to the melted butter and stir to combine.
Once the bread is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a minute or two.
Brush the wine-infused butter on top of each piece of bread.
Top each piece of toast with a sprinkle of sugar and a few pieces of crushed candy.
